ground_truth.title: Crusher ANC 2
ground_truth.main_content:
Sensory Bass Headphones with Active Noise Canceling

CRUSH THE NOISE WITH MIND-BENDING BASS

Welcome to your all-access pass to immersive sound. Crusher ANC 2 levels up your listening with adjustable sensory bass and customizable noise cancellation that adapts to your world, or blocks it out completely. Whether you're front row at a sold-out show (in your head) or zoning in with zero distractions, you're in control. Personalized sound? You got it. With the Skull-iQ app, dial in your unique hearing profile, tweak the EQ, and even assign custom button functions. It's your sound, your way.

- Multi-Sensory Bass Technology
- Adjustable 4-Mic Active Noise Canceling
- 60 hours battery + rapid charge
- Personal Sound by Mimi
- Multipoint Pairing
- Customizable in Skull-iQ App

Additional Features

- Skull-iQ App Compatibility
- Adjustable Stay-Aware Mode
- Preset EQ Modes (Music, Movie, Podcast)
- Custom EQ Mode
- Clear Voice Smart Mic
- 60 Hours Battery (ANC Off)
- 50 Hours Battery (ANC On)
- Rapid Charge (10 min = 4 hrs)
- Call, Track & Volume Control
- Custom Button Functions
- Tile Finding Technology
- Spotify Tap
- Take Photo
- Auto Connect
- Bluetooth v5.2
- Flat-Folding & Collapsible Design

Technical Specifications

- Product Type: Bluetooth Over-Ear
- Connection Type: Bluetooth v5.2
- Impedance: Driver 32 Ohm; Crusher 8 Ohm
- Driver Diameter: 40mm
- THD: <3%
- Sound Pressure Level: 100±3dB@1khz
- Frequency Response: 20Hz - 20KHz
- Weight: 332g

What's in the box:

- Crusher ANC 2 Wireless Headphones
- USB-C Charging Cable
- Back-up AUX Cable
- Satin Drawstring Bag
- Quick Start & User Guides

CHARGE LESS. CRUSH MORE.

Up to 60 hours of playtime (yeah, seriously). Even with ANC on, you're still getting 50 hours of non-stop sound. Running low? Rapid Charge gives you 4 more hours in just 10 minutes.

FAQ

What makes Crusher ANC 2 headphones perfect for music and streaming?

Simple: the features. Excellent active noise cancellation keeps out everything but your music or media. Custom EQ options mean you can tailor your experience and sound. But if you're into bass, the immersive sensory bass will blow your mind. And up to 60 hours of battery life, there's nothing stopping you from enjoying it all on your terms.

What gives Crusher ANC 2 headphones such powerful bass?

Crusher bass technology throws in sensory feedback so you can literally feel the bass like no other headphones. The custom EQ that lets you dial in your perfect chest-pounding bass level doesn't hurt either.

What gives Crusher ANC 2 headphones superior noise canceling?

Crusher ANC 2 headphones include active noise canceling, which cancels out ambient noise. The headphones use 4 dedicated external microphones pick up on all the noise around you. They then emit specific audio signals that cancel it all out. The result is crystal clear audio with no distractions.

What makes Crusher ANC 2 headphones ideal for travel?

Having your headphones die on you while traveling is truly a fate worse than death. Crusher ANC 2 keeps you alive with 50-60 hours of battery life (depending on whether active noise cancellation is on/off) and get 4 hours of charge in just 10 minutes. The foldable design that helps them fit anywhere is also a nice touch.

How can I increase or decrease the bass on my Crusher ANC 2 headphones?

To increase or decrease the bass on your Crusher ANC 2 headphones, simply scroll the wheel on the left earcup up or down. You can also switch between Crusher Bass presets by pressing the control once.

How can I turn on or turn off active noise canceling on my Crusher ANC 2 headphones?

To turn active noise cancellation on or off on the Crusher ANC 2s, just use the dedicated button on the headphones.

How can I personalize the audio on my Crusher ANC 2 headphones?

To personalize your audio on the Crusher ANC 2 headphones you've got two options. If you want a truly custom experience, connect to the Skull-iQ App to create your own custom 5-band EQ mode. Or if you want something fast, just switch between the preset EQ modes (music, movie, podcast) right on the headphones.
